name: sendsprint-explainer-video
description: Remotion-based animated explainer for the SendSprint Claude Code skill.

scripts.build:explainers: remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintExplainer preview/sendsprint-explainer.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintExplainerEN preview/sendsprint-explainer-en.mp4
scripts.build:before-after: remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfter out/sendsprint-before-after-pt.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfterEN out/sendsprint-before-after-en.mp4
scripts.build:before-after:preview: remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfter preview/sendsprint-before-after-pt.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfterEN preview/sendsprint-before-after-en.mp4
scripts.build:runloop: remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintRunLoop preview/runloop.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts SendSprintRunLoopEN preview/runloop-en.mp4
scripts.build:preview: npm run audio && npm run build:before-after:preview && npm run build:runloop && npm run build:explainers
scripts.still:before-after: remotion still src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfter out/sendsprint-before-after-poster-pt.png --frame=90 && remotion still src/index.ts SendSprintBeforeAfterEN out/sendsprint-before-after-poster-en.png --frame=90
